title: East China Normal University (ECNU / 华东师范大学)
html:
Stub. The Shanghai university where Yahir studied during the shanghai study abroad semester (Fall 2024). Putuo Campus, Zaoyang Road 788. Multiple voice memos labeled with this address — Yahir used the location as a default voice-memo title while doing Mandarin oral practice. See 2024 09 23 east china normal university putuo campus zaoyang road 788 haomen 2 and 2024 11 20 east china normal university 2; sits inside the china chapter cluster.

First mentioned in the voice-memo batch ingested 2026-04-27.

Source summaries

  • 2024 09 07 voice memo 0208 — 2 AM Shanghai-arrival music-only clip
  • 2024 09 23 east china normal university putuo campus zaoyang road 788 haomen 2 — Mandarin oral practice on hometown prompt

related.label: ECNU Putuo — Mandarin oral practice (家乡 / hometown), Sep 23 2024
